name: @k3_2o/pi-chrollo
description: Agentic memory for Pi — verbatim session capture + grep retrieval
author: k3_2o

scripts.smoke: tsx -e "import './index'; import './src/search'; import './src/storage'; import './src/stats'; import './src/format'; import './src/capture'; console.log('OK')"
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run smoke
scripts.build-thesaurus: npm install --no-save wordpos && tsx scripts/build-thesaurus.ts && npm uninstall wordpos
